enterPrevJobDetails.jcr:title: Enter previous job details
enterPrevJobDetails.expJson: \{"nodeName":"RULES","items":[{"nodeName":"ROOT","items":[{"nodeName":"STATEMENT","choice":{"nodeName":"EVENT_SCRIPTS","items":[{"nodeName":"EVENT_CONDITION","choice":{"nodeName":"EVENT_AND_COMPARISON","items":[{"nodeName":"COMPONENT","value":{"id":"FORM.guideRootPanel.employmentHistoryPanel.enterPrevJobDetails","displayName":"Enter previous job details","type":"STRING","displayPath":"FORM/guideRootPanel/Employment History/Enter previous job details/","name":"enterPrevJobDetails"}},{"nodeName":"EVENT_AND_COMPARISON_OPERATOR","choice":{"nodeName":"EQUALS_TO","value":null}},{"nodeName":"PRIMITIVE_EXPRESSION","choice":{"nodeName":"STRING_LITERAL","value":"0"}}]},"nested":false},{"nodeName":"Then","value":null},{"nodeName":"BLOCK_STATEMENTS","items":[{"nodeName":"BLOCK_STATEMENT","choice":{"nodeName":"SET_FOCUS","items":[{"nodeName":"to","value":null},{"nodeName":"AFCOMPONENT","value":{"id":"FORM.guideRootPanel.employmentHistoryPanel.empDetailList.employmentDetailInfo.prevDesignation","displayName":"Designation*","type":"AFCOMPONENT","displayPath":"FORM/guideRootPanel/Employment History/Employment detail list/Employment detail/Designation*/","name":"prevDesignation"}}]}}]}]}}],"isValid":true,"script":"/**\\n\\n * This is a machine-generated code for the rule.\\n * If you modify it in the code editor, you will not be able to view and edit the rule in the visual editor.\\n */\\n\\nif (this.value == \\"0\\") {\\n guideBridge.setFocus(prevDesignation.somExpression);\\n}\\n","eventName":"Value Commit"}]}
enterPrevJobDetails.name: enterPrevJobDetails

employmentDetailInfo.jcr:title: Employment detail
employmentDetailInfo.expJson: \{"nodeName":"RULES","items":[{"nodeName":"ROOT","items":[{"nodeName":"STATEMENT","choice":{"nodeName":"SHOW_EXPRESSION","items":[{"nodeName":"AFCOMPONENT","value":{"id":"FORM.guideRootPanel.employmentHistoryPanel.empDetailList.employmentDetailInfo","type":"PANEL|AFCOMPONENT|REPEATABLE_PANEL","name":"employmentDetailInfo"}},{"nodeName":"When","value":null},{"nodeName":"CONDITIONORALWAYS","choice":{"nodeName":"COMPARISON_EXPRESSION","items":[{"nodeName":"EXPRESSION","choice":{"nodeName":"COMPONENT","value":{"id":"FORM.guideRootPanel.employmentHistory.enterPrevJobDetails","displayName":"Enter previous job details","type":"STRING","displayPath":"FORM/guideRootPanel/Employment History/Enter previous job details/","name":"enterPrevJobDetails"}}},{"nodeName":"OPERATOR","choice":{"nodeName":"EQUALS_TO","value":null}},{"nodeName":"EXPRESSION","choice":{"nodeName":"STRING_LITERAL","value":"0"}}]}},{"nodeName":"Else","value":null},{"nodeName":"DONOTHING_OR_HIDE","choice":{"nodeName":"Hide","value":null}}]}}],"isValid":true,"script":"/**\\n\\n * This is a machine-generated code for the rule.\\n * If you modify it in the code editor, you will not be able to view and edit the rule in the visual editor.\\n */\\n\\nif (enterPrevJobDetails.value == \\"0\\") {\\n true;\\n } else {\\n false;\\n}\\n","eventName":"Visibility"},{"script":{"field":"FORM.guideRootPanel.employmentHistoryPanel.empDetailList.employmentDetailInfo","event":"Summary","model":{"nodeName":"SUMMARY_EXPRESSION"},"content":"if(prevDesignation.value!= null && prevOrgName.value!=null){\\nprevDesignation.value+\\" at \\"+prevOrgName.value; }\\nelse{\\n\\"Employment detail\\";}"},"nodeName":"SCRIPTMODEL","version":1}]}
employmentDetailInfo.name: employmentDetailInfo

empStart.expJson: \{"nodeName":"RULES","items":[{"nodeName":"ROOT","items":[{"nodeName":"STATEMENT","choice":{"nodeName":"VALIDATE_EXPRESSION","items":[{"nodeName":"AFCOMPONENT","value":{"id":"FORM.guideRootPanel.employmentHistoryPanel.empDetailList.employmentDetailInfo.empStart","displayName":"From*","type":"AFCOMPONENT","displayPath":"FORM/guideRootPanel/Employment History/Employment detail list/Employment detail/From*/","name":"empStart"}},{"nodeName":"Using","value":null},{"nodeName":"Expression","value":null},{"nodeName":"CONDITION","choice":{"nodeName":"COMPARISON_EXPRESSION","items":[{"nodeName":"EXPRESSION","choice":{"nodeName":"COMPONENT","value":{"id":"FORM.guideRootPanel.employmentHistoryPanel.empDetailList.employmentDetailInfo.empStart","displayName":"From*","type":"DATE FIELD|STRING","displayPath":"FORM/guideRootPanel/Employment History/Employment detail list/Employment detail/From*/","name":"empStart"}}},{"nodeName":"OPERATOR","choice":{"nodeName":"IS_BEFORE","value":null}},{"nodeName":"EXPRESSION","choice":{"nodeName":"FUNCTION_CALL","functionName":{"id":"getCurrentDate","displayName":"Get Current Date","type":"STRING","isDuplicate":false,"displayPath":"","args":[],"impl":"(new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10))"},"params":[]}}]},"nested":false}]}}],"isValid":true,"script":"/**\\n\\n * This is a machine-generated code for the rule.\\n * If you modify it in the code editor, you will not be able to view and edit the rule in the visual editor.\\n */\\n\\nnew Date(this.value)<new Date((new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10)));\\n\\n","eventName":"Validate"}]}
empStart.name: empStart
empStart.validateExpMessage: Employement start date can not be in future

empEnd.expJson: Date(FORM.guideRootPanel.employmentHistory.empDetailList.employmentDetailInfo.empStart.value);\\n\\n","eventName":"Validate"},{"nodeName":"ROOT","items":[{"nodeName":"STATEMENT","choice":{"nodeName":"VALIDATE_EXPRESSION","items":[{"nodeName":"AFCOMPONENT","value":{"id":"FORM.guideRootPanel.employmentHistoryPanel.empDetailList.employmentDetailInfo.empEnd","displayName":"To*","type":"AFCOMPONENT","displayPath":"FORM/guideRootPanel/Employment Current Date","type":"STRING","isDuplicate":false,"displayPath":"","args":[],"impl":"(new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10))"},"params":[]}}]},"nested":false}]}}],"isValid":true,"script":"/**\\n\\n * This is a machine-generated code for the rule.\\n * If you modify it in the code editor, you will not be able to view and edit the rule in the visual editor.\\n */\\n\\nnew Date(this.value)<new Date((new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10)));\\n\\n","eventName":"Validate"}]}
empEnd.name: empEnd
empEnd.validateExpMessage: Employment end date can not be before start date.
